title: Adult oral health survey 2023
body: "This survey was designed as a continuation of the long-running adult dental health surveys, carried out in the United Kingdom since 1968. The current release only applies to England.  This survey release includes data on the:   clinical examination of respondents’ teeth and mouth impacts of oral health usual patterns of dental attendance oral health-related behaviours   The survey was carried out between June 2023 and April 2024 with a representative sample of adults aged 16 years and over. "
